Home > @imqueue/core > IMQ > create

IMQ.create() method

Instantiate proper message queue instance using given user-options

Signature:

static create(name: string, options?: Partial<IMQOptions>, mode?: IMQMode): IMessageQueue;

Parameters

Parameter

Type

Description

name

string

options

Partial<IMQOptions>

(Optional)

mode

IMQMode

(Optional) {IMessageQueue}

IMessageQueue
